name: HEALTHPEAK PROPERTIES, INC.
business: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. is a REIT that owns, operates, and develops high-quality real estate focused on healthcare discovery and delivery in the United States, with a diversified portfolio across outpatient medical, lab, and senior housing properties.

exposures.sentence: Our lab properties, which contain laboratory and office space, are leased primarily to biotechnology, medical device and pharmaceutical companies, scientific research institutions, government agencies, and other organizations involved in the life science industry.

Our lab properties, which contain laboratory and office space, are leased primarily to biotechnology, medical device and pharmaceutical companies, scientific research institutions, government agencies, and other organizations involved in the life science industry.
Under the senior housing segment, our properties are operated through RIDEA structures.
Our outpatient medical segment includes outpatient medical buildings and hospitals.

catalysts.event: Complete Janus Living Offering (IPO of senior housing company)
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the Offering in the first half of 2026, subject to market conditions, receipt of regulatory approvals, completion of related financings, completion of the SEC s review, and other customary conditions.

catalysts.event: Acquire remaining 46.5% interest in SWF SH JV
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we acquired the remaining 46.5% interest in the SWF SH JV for $312 million, bringing our ownership interest in the 19 senior housing properties to 100%.

catalysts.event: Acquire remaining 50% interest in Gateway Crossing JV
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we acquired the remaining 50% interest in the Gateway Crossing JV for consideration paid, net of discounts and closing costs, of $132 million, bringing our equity ownership in these six buildings to 100%.
